mapper.select: select date_format(delivery_date, '%m-%d') as label, coalesce(sum(total_amount), 0) as amount from biz_delivery_order where delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and delivery_date < #{endDate} and status = '已归档' group by delivery_date order by delivery_date

select date_format(delivery_date, '%Y-%m') as label, coalesce(sum(total_amount), 0) as amount from biz_delivery_order where delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and delivery_date < #{endDate} and status = '已归档' group by date_format(delivery_date, '%Y-%m') order by date_format(delivery_date, '%Y-%m')

select c.name as customerName, max(r.route_name) as routeName, count(o.order_id) as orderCount, coalesce(sum(o.total_amount), 0) as amount, case when #{totalAmount} > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(o.total_amount), 0) / #{totalAmount} * 100, 1) else 0 end as percent from biz_customer_order o inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id left join biz_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id left join biz_route r on d.route_id = r.route_id where d.delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and d.delivery_date < #{endDate} and d.status = '已归档' group by o.customer_id, c.name order by amount desc limit 10

select coalesce(sum(i.quantity), 0) from biz_customer_order_item i inner join biz_customer_order o on i.order_id = o.order_id inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id where d.delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and d.delivery_date < #{endDate} and d.status = '已归档'

select i.product_name as productName, i.specification as specification, count(distinct o.order_id) as orderCount, coalesce(sum(i.quantity), 0) as quantity, coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) as amount, case when #{totalQuantity} > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(i.quantity), 0) / #{totalQuantity} * 100, 1) else 0 end as percent from biz_customer_order_item i inner join biz_customer_order o on i.order_id = o.order_id inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id where d.delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and d.delivery_date < #{endDate} and d.status = '已归档' group by i.product_id, i.product_name, i.specification order by quantity desc, amount desc limit 10

select coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) as salesAmount, coalesce(sum(coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) as costAmount, coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) as profitAmount, case when coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) / coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) * 100, 1) else 0 end as profitRate from biz_customer_order_item i inner join biz_customer_order o on i.order_id = o.order_id inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id where d.delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and d.delivery_date < #{endDate} and d.status = '已归档'

select c.name as name, max(r.route_name) as subName, count(distinct o.order_id) as orderCount, coalesce(sum(i.quantity), 0) as quantity, coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) as salesAmount, coalesce(sum(coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) as costAmount, coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) as profitAmount, case when coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) / coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) * 100, 1) else 0 end as profitRate, case when #{totalProfit} > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) / #{totalProfit} * 100, 1) else 0 end as percent from biz_customer_order_item i inner join biz_customer_order o on i.order_id = o.order_id inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id left join biz_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id left join biz_route r on d.route_id = r.route_id where d.delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and d.delivery_date < #{endDate} and d.status = '已归档' group by o.customer_id, c.name order by profitAmount desc, salesAmount desc limit 10

select i.product_name as name, i.specification as subName, count(distinct o.order_id) as orderCount, coalesce(sum(i.quantity), 0) as quantity, coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) as salesAmount, coalesce(sum(coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) as costAmount, coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) as profitAmount, case when coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) / coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) * 100, 1) else 0 end as profitRate, case when #{totalProfit} > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) / #{totalProfit} * 100, 1) else 0 end as percent from biz_customer_order_item i inner join biz_customer_order o on i.order_id = o.order_id inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id where d.delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and d.delivery_date < #{endDate} and d.status = '已归档' group by i.product_id, i.product_name, i.specification order by profitAmount desc, salesAmount desc limit 10

select r.route_name as name, count(distinct o.order_id) as orderCount, coalesce(sum(i.quantity), 0) as quantity, coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) as salesAmount, coalesce(sum(coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) as costAmount, coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) as profitAmount, case when coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) / coalesce(sum(i.amount), 0) * 100, 1) else 0 end as profitRate, case when #{totalProfit} > 0 then round(coalesce(sum(i.amount - coalesce(i.cost_price, 0) * i.quantity), 0) / #{totalProfit} * 100, 1) else 0 end as percent from biz_customer_order_item i inner join biz_customer_order o on i.order_id = o.order_id inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id left join biz_route r on d.route_id = r.route_id where d.delivery_date >= #{beginDate} and d.delivery_date < #{endDate} and d.status = '已归档' group by d.route_id, r.route_name order by profitAmount desc, salesAmount desc limit 10
